title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Booking Process
text:
Q: How do I know my annual leave entitlement and book my vacation?
A: Each full-time employee is entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per calendar year, in addition to public holidays. Part-time employees receive a pro-rated amount based on their working hours. To book your vacation, first check your remaining leave balance on the HR portal. Once confirmed, submit a leave request through the same portal, specifying the dates you wish to take off. Your request will be reviewed by your manager and you will receive a notification once it is approved. Please ensure to submit your request at least two weeks in advance to allow for proper planning and coverage.
